summary: Bug classified as type=bug_fix severity=high. Four affected files confirmed by reading source code: ios/Runner/Info.plist missing MBXAccessToken key (iOS native SDK initializes before Dart), lib/main.dart conditional token set (silently no-ops on misconfiguration), lib/shared/widgets/map/route_map_preview.dart no onMapLoadError handler on MapWidget, lib/features/events/presentation/tracking/widgets/live_map_widget.dart no onMapLoadError handler. mapbox_maps_flutter 2.23.1 confirmed in pubspec.lock. No design, backend, or DB changes needed. PRD_NORMALIZED.md and po.md written with 8 numbered acceptance criteria and regression guardrail table.
